name: disease.sh
description: Open disease data API for COVID-19, influenza, and other disease statistics worldwide.
longDescription: disease.sh (formerly NovelCOVID API) is an open-source API providing worldwide disease statistics. It aggregates data from multiple trusted sources including Johns Hopkins CSSE, Worldometers, and the New York Times. The API provides country, state/province, and county-level COVID-19 statistics, historical data, vaccine data, government interventions, and news. Also supports influenza data for the US.
affiliateText: Building a health dashboard? Deploy on Vercel for lightning-fast global delivery.
